oath_tactics.name: Red Pursuit
oath_tactics.rules_text: When Rowan hits a marked enemy, deal 2 extra oath damage.

oath_tactics.name: First Blood
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first marked target Rowan hits each combat takes 3 extra oath damage.

oath_tactics.name: Spear Line
oath_tactics.rules_text: Rowan adds 1 Tactical Mark when he hits.

oath_tactics.name: Second Cut
oath_tactics.rules_text: After the second card you play each turn, deal 3 oath damage to the target.

oath_tactics.name: Smoke Step
oath_tactics.rules_text: At combat start, gain 1 block for each card in hand.

oath_tactics.name: Quick Claim
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first 0-cost card each combat applies 1 Tactical Mark.

oath_tactics.name: Shared Guard
oath_tactics.rules_text: Block cards grant 2 extra block.

oath_tactics.name: Oathwall
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first enemy attack each combat is reduced by 2.

oath_tactics.name: Last Stand
oath_tactics.rules_text: While HP is 40% or lower, block cards grant 2 extra block.

oath_tactics.name: Blood Wager
oath_tactics.rules_text: After you lose HP from a card, deal 4 oath damage to the target.

oath_tactics.name: Hard Bargain
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first self-damage card each combat refunds 1 energy.

oath_tactics.name: Red Laugh
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first time Bram helps defeat an enemy each combat, heal 2.

oath_tactics.name: Measured Care
oath_tactics.rules_text: Healing cards also grant 2 block.

oath_tactics.name: No Free Debt
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first healing card each combat refunds 1 energy.

oath_tactics.name: Clean Bandage
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first block card each turn heals 1.

oath_tactics.name: Shield Rent
oath_tactics.rules_text: Block cards grant 3 extra block.

oath_tactics.name: Low Stance
oath_tactics.rules_text: At combat start, if HP is 50% or lower, gain 6 block.

oath_tactics.name: Mark Break
oath_tactics.rules_text: When Tor hits a marked enemy, deal 2 extra oath damage.

oath_tactics.name: Green Pin
oath_tactics.rules_text: Tactical Mark cards apply 1 extra Mark.

oath_tactics.name: Bitter Dose
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first skill card each turn deals 2 oath damage to the target.

oath_tactics.name: Last Leaf
oath_tactics.rules_text: Healing cards also apply 1 Tactical Mark to the target.

oath_tactics.name: Star Count
oath_tactics.rules_text: After your third card each turn, draw 1.

oath_tactics.name: First Read
oath_tactics.rules_text: At combat start, draw 1.

oath_tactics.name: Zero Map
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first 0-cost card each combat grants 1 energy.

oath_tactics.name: White Guard
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first healing card each combat grants 5 block.

oath_tactics.name: Lantern
oath_tactics.rules_text: At combat start, if HP is 50% or lower, heal 2.

oath_tactics.name: Mercy Line
oath_tactics.rules_text: The first block card each turn heals 1.

oath_tactics.name: Five Hand
oath_tactics.rules_text: Every 5 combat wins with Kyle pays a random wager reward.

oath_tactics.name: Clean Exit
oath_tactics.rules_text: Victories at 70% HP or higher count twice toward Kyle's wager.

oath_tactics.name: Loaded Coin
oath_tactics.rules_text: Kyle's wager has worse average payout but a bigger jackpot.
